description_long: This object is a tall, rectangular lotion bottle with a minimalist design, featuring a smooth, hard exterior surface. The front face displays subtle embossed or printed text, likely indicating branding and product information, while the back face contains more detailed labeling, including usage instructions and regulatory symbols. The bottle is capped with a flat, seamless top, suggesting a secure closure, possibly a screw-on or snap-on cap. The overall color is a uniform light gray or off-white, giving it a clean and modern appearance. The sides are plain, with no visible handles or protrusions, emphasizing its streamlined form. The object appears to be made primarily of plastic, typical for personal care product containers.
description: A tall, rectangular, light gray lotion bottle with a smooth, minimalist surface and subtle labeling on the front and back.
description_view_0: Front view showing subtle embossed or printed text, likely branding and product information.
description_view_1: Side view with a plain, unmarked surface and no visible features.
description_view_2: Back view displaying detailed labeling, including instructions and regulatory symbols.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, also plain and featureless.
